chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text:
The purpose of this subchapter is to:

(1) in the public interest, stimulate and preserve maritime commerce on the pilotage grounds of this state by limiting and regulating the liability of pilots; and

(2) maintain pilotage fees at reasonable levels.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.081 — Purpose

The purpose of this subchapter is to:

    (1) in the public interest, stimulate and preserve maritime commerce on the pilotage grounds of this state by limiting and regulating the liability of pilots; and

    (2) maintain pilotage fees at reasonable levels.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: The purpose of this subchapter is to:

maintain pilotage fees at reasonable levels.
